faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Rye homes?
faqs.answer: Rye's proximity to Long Island Sound creates higher humidity levels, and the area's many historic homes often have older plumbing, basements, and crawl spaces where moisture accumulates. Silverfish are attracted to these damp environments and feed on paper, glue, and organic materials commonly found in older homes. Our treatments address both the infestation and moisture issues.
